PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Whitehead for and with Donna Carnes-Gray (Petitioner).

The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Death (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
